posts.author: jglasgow (jglasgow@truvolv.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! I am using a form to create new tasks on my board. In this form, users submit additional information on the task via the updates section. I would love to have the following features added to the automation options

  1. Could have a specific condition for item submitted via ___ form
  2. Automatically pin update(s) based on existing criteria options
  3. When an update is sent via form, automatically pin the update
